description: A creator-uploaded YouTube caption track is parsed into normalized segments; no STT is run.
assertions: nothing is written to the store

description: With only a downloaded media file, local STT produces the transcript on-device; no network.
assertions: audio and transcript stay on the machine

description: With no STT backend installed and no caption, return the run_local_stt gap with the per-OS install, never a fake transcript.
assertions: gap is run_local_stt with an install command
